heading: System and Disk Alerts
body:
The following alert conditions measure usage on your Atlas server
clusters:

> **Note:** Currently, Atlas uses a single partition for data, index, and
> journal files. Even though the alerts reference individual
> partitions, they point to the same metric.

> **Note:** All hardware metrics have burst reporting equivalents with distinct
> configurable alerts. To learn more, see [Burst Reporting](burst-metrics).
